scripts.copy-txt: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src='src/modules/tools/builtin';const dst='dist/modules/tools/builtin';fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.txt')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f)));const skillSrc='src/modules/skill';const skillDst='dist/modules/skill';fs.mkdirSync(skillDst,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(path.join(skillSrc,'skill.txt'),path.join(skillDst,'skill.txt'));const promptSrc='src/modules/ai/react/prompt';const promptDst='dist/modules/ai/react/prompt';fs.mkdirSync(promptDst,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(path.join(promptSrc,'role.txt'),path.join(promptDst,'role.txt'));console.log('Copied .txt files to dist')"
scripts.web:build: cd web && npm install && npm run build
